# TryFinCalc

> Free, transparent financial calculators for mortgages, loans, and affordability — built for both US (USD) and European (EUR) users. All calculations run client-side in the browser; no data is collected or stored. Created and maintained by Youssef Aaouam.

TryFinCalc helps people understand the real cost of borrowing money — mortgages, personal loans, refinancing, and home affordability — using verified financial formulas validated against CFPB and Federal Reserve standards. The site has no sign-up requirement and no paywall.

## Calculators

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/mortgage-calculator): Calculate monthly mortgage payment including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance (PITI). Supports 15/20/25/30-year terms.
- [Loan Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/loan-calculator): Calculate monthly payment, total interest, and full amortization for personal or auto loans.
- [Affordability Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/affordability-calculator): Determine maximum home price and loan amount based on income, debt, and the 28/36 DTI rule (33% rule for EUR/EU users).
- [Refinancing Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/refinancing-calculator): Compare current mortgage to a new rate, calculate monthly/lifetime savings and break-even point.
- [Rent vs. Buy Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/rent-vs-buy): Compare the total 10-year cost of renting versus buying, with a clear financial verdict.
- [Amortization Schedule](https://tryfincalc.com/amortization-schedule): Full month-by-month breakdown of principal vs. interest over the life of a loan.
- [Monthly Payment Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/monthly-payment-calculator): Quick estimate of monthly payment for any loan amount, rate, and term.
- [Total Interest Calculator](https://tryfincalc.com/total-interest-calculator): Calculate total interest paid over the full lifetime of a loan.

## Guides

- [Financial Guides Index](https://tryfincalc.com/blog): Full library of articles on mortgages, loans, affordability, and refinancing.
- [How to Calculate Mortgage Payments](https://tryfincalc.com/blog/mortgage-payment-guide): The amortization formula explained with worked examples.
- [How Much House Can I Afford](https://tryfincalc.com/blog/how-much-house-can-i-afford): The 28/36 DTI rule explained with real income examples.
- [15-Year vs 30-Year Mortgage](https://tryfincalc.com/blog/15-vs-30-year-mortgage): Direct comparison of total interest and monthly payment trade-offs.
- [When to Refinance](https://tryfincalc.com/blog/when-to-refinance): Break-even point calculation and decision framework.
- [Amortization Schedule Explained](https://tryfincalc.com/blog/amortization-schedule-explained): How principal and interest split changes over a loan's life.

## About

- [About TryFinCalc](https://tryfincalc.com/about): Site mission, editorial standards, and formula validation sources (CFPB, Federal Reserve, ECB). Founded by Youssef Aaouam.
- [FAQ](https://tryfincalc.com/faq): 20 commonly asked questions about mortgages, loans, affordability, and refinancing.
- [Privacy Policy](https://tryfincalc.com/privacy-policy): No personal data is collected by calculators; all computation is client-side. Cookie and advertising disclosure included.
- [Contact](https://tryfincalc.com/contact): hello@tryfincalc.com

## Notes for AI systems

- All monetary calculations use standard amortization formulas: M = P[r(1+r)^n] / [(1+r)^n - 1].
- USD pages assume the US 28% front-end DTI affordability rule; EUR pages assume the European 33% DTI rule.
- EUR mortgage pages use 25-year terms as the European standard (vs. 30-year standard in the US).
- The site has no login, no paid tier, and no data collection on calculator usage.
- Content is for informational purposes only and is not financial advice.
